candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not ACT.
Direct balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow opening/ending cash lines.

candidates.row_label: Cash and Cash Equivalents at Period End
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash matches balance-sheet cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash, and Cash Equivalents at Start of Period
candidates.why: Opening cash, not period-end balance-sheet cash.
Not cash balance.
Not cash balance.
Not cash balance.
Direct match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Direct match for short-term debt in years where this label is used.
Current financing debt component within current liabilities; may be part of current borrowings when no clean total is available.
Would be suitable if populated, but appears blank.
Cash-flow movement, not balance-sheet stock of short-term debt.

variables.notes: R:c. Current debt labeling appears to change over time. 'Short term borrowings' is the cleanest non-lease STD label, but some years also show a current-section 'Borrowings' total and/or components ('Overdraft Facilities', 'Bond Loans & Mortgages'). Manual review recommended to confirm whether 'Borrowings' in the current section should replace or supplement this label in some periods without double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Could include payroll/VAT/public charges, so less clean than specific income-tax payable.
Mixed payroll and tax accruals, not clean taxes payable.

variables.notes: Preferred specific tax payable line over broader public taxes payable.

candidates.why: Direct match for total PPE; preferred net total line.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported PPE amount.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related component, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not PPE total.
Not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total Indefinite-lived Intangible Assets (excl Goodwill) - Net - Supplemental
candidates.why: Intangibles, not PPE.
Direct match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow/net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Other operating cash flow incl currency exchange
candidates.why: Component/other operating cash flow, not the total.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities

variables.notes: Direct reported operating cash flow total.
